response.justification: Mohammed Al-Said presents a solid generalist full-stack engineering background spanning 15+ years, with exposure to high-throughput distributed systems at Sociomantic and recent AI tooling work at re:cinq. However, the role demands deep expertise in experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, telemetry infrastructure, and statistical analysis — none of which appear anywhere in this resume. The candidate has never operated at Principal/IC6 scope (owning multi-team experimentation strategy) and shows no evidence of building the measurement or rollout systems central to this position. Strong general engineering skills do not compensate for the near-total absence of growth and experimentation domain experience.
strengths: 15+ years of polyglot engineering across C++, Java, TypeScript, and more, demonstrating breadth across several languages listed in the role requirements
High-throughput distributed systems experience at Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests per second, showing production-scale familiarity
Active knowledge-sharing through workshops and open-source projects indicating mentorship capability relevant to Principal-level expectations
concerns: Zero experimentation platform, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management experience — the core technical domain of this role
No telemetry infrastructure, metrics systems, or statistical analysis background; the role requires high data aptitude and experimental analysis proficiency
Career trajectory reflects Senior/Staff-level IC work with no evidence of Principal/IC6 scope: no cross-organizational technical ownership or multi-team strategy influence

key_factors.factor: No telemetry or metrics infrastructure background
